mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT f.POST_SN, f.FAQ_CTG_CD, f.FAQ_SUB_CTG_CD, f.EXPS_ORD, f.TOP_FIX_YN, b.POST_SJ, b.POST_CN, b.WRTR_USER_ID, b.REG_DT, c1.COM_CD_NM AS FAQ_CTG_NM, c2.COM_CD_NM AS FAQ_SUB_CTG_NM FROM FAQ f JOIN BOARD b ON b.POST_SN = f.POST_SN LEFT JOIN COM_CD c1 ON c1.CL_CODE = '101' AND c1.COM_CD = f.FAQ_CTG_CD LEFT JOIN COM_CD c2 ON c2.CL_CODE = '102' AND c2.COM_CD = f.FAQ_SUB_CTG_CD
ORDER BY f.TOP_FIX_YN DESC, f.EXPS_ORD ASC ) OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FAQ f JOIN BOARD b ON b.POST_SN = f.POST_SN

SELECT f.POST_SN , f.FAQ_CTG_CD , f.FAQ_SUB_CTG_CD , f.EXPS_ORD , f.TOP_FIX_YN , b.POST_SJ , b.POST_CN , b.WRTR_USER_ID , b.REG_DT , c1.COM_CD_NM AS FAQ_CTG_NM , c2.COM_CD_NM AS FAQ_SUB_CTG_NM FROM FAQ f JOIN BOARD b ON b.POST_SN = f.POST_SN LEFT JOIN COM_CD c1 ON c1.CL_CODE = '101' AND c1.COM_CD = f.FAQ_CTG_CD LEFT JOIN COM_CD c2 ON c2.CL_CODE = '102' AND c2.COM_CD = f.FAQ_SUB_CTG_CD WHERE f.POST_SN = #{postSn}

SELECT f.POST_SN , f.FAQ_CTG_CD , f.FAQ_SUB_CTG_CD , f.EXPS_ORD , f.TOP_FIX_YN , b.POST_SJ , b.POST_CN , b.WRTR_USER_ID , b.REG_DT , c1.COM_CD_NM AS FAQ_CTG_NM , c2.COM_CD_NM AS FAQ_SUB_CTG_NM FROM FAQ f JOIN BOARD b ON b.POST_SN = f.POST_SN LEFT JOIN COM_CD c1 ON c1.CL_CODE = '101' AND c1.COM_CD = f.FAQ_CTG_CD LEFT JOIN COM_CD c2 ON c2.CL_CODE = '102' AND c2.COM_CD = f.FAQ_SUB_CTG_CD WHERE f.POST_SN < #{postSn} AND f.FAQ_CTG_CD = #{faqCtgCd} ORDER BY f.POST_SN DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT f.POST_SN , f.FAQ_CTG_CD , f.FAQ_SUB_CTG_CD , f.EXPS_ORD , f.TOP_FIX_YN , b.POST_SJ , b.POST_CN , b.WRTR_USER_ID , b.REG_DT , c1.COM_CD_NM AS FAQ_CTG_NM , c2.COM_CD_NM AS FAQ_SUB_CTG_NM FROM FAQ f JOIN BOARD b ON b.POST_SN = f.POST_SN LEFT JOIN COM_CD c1 ON c1.CL_CODE = '101' AND c1.COM_CD = f.FAQ_CTG_CD LEFT JOIN COM_CD c2 ON c2.CL_CODE = '102' AND c2.COM_CD = f.FAQ_SUB_CTG_CD WHERE f.POST_SN > #{postSn} AND f.FAQ_CTG_CD = #{faqCtgCd} ORDER BY f.POST_SN ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
